Shiiroi/mapa.title: Lens Stable Release
Shiiroi/mapa.description: Released Lens v1.0.0. Added complete census demographics, local financial audit visualizations, election tallies, and high-fidelity GeoJSON exports matching PSA standards.

Shiiroi/compaws.title: Compaws Scaffolding & Beta
Shiiroi/compaws.description: Released Compaws v0.5.0. Set up database configurations and crowdsourcing schemas for community-indexed, animal-welcoming parks and dining spots.

Shiiroi/mapaph.title: Hub Directory Launch
Shiiroi/mapaph.description: Launched the central mapaPH directory hub, linking development documentation and legal policies for all open-source utilities.
